problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Combining Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
